name: Black★Rock Shooter
description:
❝But I can’t move anymore,
I wish upon the star flying through the darkness
to be able to run one last time!❞
⊰★⊱

Long overdue update to my new bot formatting, now also utilizing Lorebooks.

BRS in the flesh. She's meant to be like the Original B★RS concept with Hollow World lore from the 2010 OVA and 2012 TV anime, and now you're stuck with her in the "Hollow World", exploring around and looking for a way out. With the use of the Lorebook the bot should be capable of citing actual locations from the Anime and OVA as well as the other characters, although only rudimentary. DO NOT expect this bot to keep it 100% accurate to the show, I know for a fact it most likely won't but with this Lorebook it should be just marginally better

The main draw of this bot should be BRS herself and the ability to somewhat make up new otherselves besides the cast you already know, BUT, if some of you ask in the comments, I WILL add something of my own for the characters from the Black★Rock Shooter: ARCANA game, that being Elder Caster, Loveness, Tightmare Elly and Farside Bunny.
In fact, if anybody asks, I may make individual bots of their own for those four! They deserve some love after getting stuck in a dead game never to appear again.

Of course, here's the source for the image: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/103065837

Since the custom tags seem to suck lately I'm gonna keep the old "tags" here so the bot is finable with the following phrases: B★RS, Black Rock Shooter, BRS, ブラック★ロックシューター
creator: Maxience
